notes: Market is closed today for Juneteenth — no trading. VIX ticked up to 17.2 and futures slipped into the long weekend on Fed-hike worries despite Iran-deal optimism; nudging risk slightly down to 0.45 since strong jobs/inflation data is pushing rate expectations higher.
journal_entry: Juneteenth holiday — exchanges closed, holding flat. Shaved 0.5→0.45 as the macro tone shifted: VIX 16.4→17.2, futures softer, markets pricing higher rates after the strong jobs report. Avoids unchanged (parabolic AMC/BFLY/GPUS, CLOV, AAPL extended, AMD/ROKU/SABR soft). Chip theme MU/MRVL/SNDK/NBIS still the leaders; reassess re-risking Monday on yields and whether the rally follows through.
